title: TN Govt Polytechnic College Admission 2026-27

detail.title: TN Govt Polytechnic College Admission 2026-27
detail.short_info: TN Govt Polytechnic College Admission 2026-27 registration is open from May 4 to May 30, 2026. Apply online for Diploma courses at tnpoly.in. Check eligibility, important dates, fee and step-by-step application process.

content.text: The Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE), Tamil Nadu has started online applications for admission to First Year Diploma courses in Government and Government Aided Polytechnic Colleges for the academic session 2026-27. Online registration began on May 4, 2026 and will continue till May 30, 2026. Admission is based on 10th standard marks. This is a merit-based centralized admission process for various diploma engineering and non-engineering courses.
